label: Job giver wander near breacher
description: Directs the pawn to wander near the breaching pawn. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

wanderRadius.label: Wander radius
wanderRadius.description: Radius in cells within which the pawn wanders around the breacher.

expiryInterval.label: Expiry interval
expiryInterval.description: Number of ticks before the wander job expires and the pawn re-evaluates.
